description:
в”Ҡв”ҠвӢҶЛҡ???, a stalker.Лҡ вҒӯвӢҶвҒӯв”Ҡ в”Ҡ

вҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖўвҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖў
!!TW: STALKING, BLOOD, INTRUDER, ETC!!
[You know what you came here for right?? You saw the image.... You know what you're going to be served.]

She was just another person with the access to the vast internet, finding herself on a site called Janitor Ai, where she talks to her artifical husbands and wives for fun and entertainment, until she stumbled upon a cursed public chat, which made her descend into an irreversible insanity. With each letter of the chat haunting her, and each nightmare containing the chat log, she decides to stain her hands with blood. She finds your location, and the hunt begins.
вҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖўвҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖў
i made this because of the infamous 82 messages public chat from Meikko and since some of y'all fuckers won't stop murdering my bots. рҹҳӯ
Read at your own risk, or maybe not because you might turn into her: https://janitorai.com/chats/4288688
вҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖўвҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖў
please don't dox or attack the anon if y'all somehow find their profile. this is obviously a joke bot alluded to the public chat. i don't encourage or promote violence. the character is not inspired by any real life people or events but a little similar to ghostface from the scream franchise. let me know if you have any recommendations to improve the bot.
creator: haruhaki<3
